title: Restaurant Order and Customer Analyzer
category: Scanner, Methods, If-Else, Switch, Exception Handling
description: Create a simple Java console-based application that analyzes a customer's order amount, customer age category, and meal category.

easy.summary: Input customer name, order amount, and meal code. Display order category and meal category.
requirements: Use clear input prompts, for example Enter Customer Name:, Enter Order Amount:, and Enter Meal Code:.
Display the required output values clearly after all inputs are processed.
Ask for customer name, order amount, and meal code.
Determine the order category using getOrderCategory(double amount).
Determine the meal category using getMealCategory(String mealCode).
Use if-else for order category and switch for meal code.

medium.summary: Add customer age and display customer category.
requirements: Add an input for customer age.
Display customer age and customer category.
Add customer age as a new input.
Determine the customer category using getCustomerCategory(int age).

hard.summary: Display the complete restaurant order result.
requirements: Display the final output clearly and consistently.
Display the complete restaurant order result.
Display the complete restaurant order result after all inputs are entered.
Include customer name, order amount, order category, customer age, customer category, meal code, and meal category.
Handle invalid order amount and age values properly.
